title: Robin Boards the Sea Train
description: Back in the present, Aqua Laguna bears down on Water Seven while CP9 prepares to leave with Robin and Franky.
scene: Across pages 5, 6, 7, 8, this part follows Franky, Luffy, Nami, Zoro, Sanji. Back in the present, Aqua Laguna bears down on Water Seven while CP9 prepares to leave with Robin and Franky.

dialogue.speaker: Franky
dialogue.text: You're still making these weird battleships!!!

dialogue.speaker: Franky
dialogue.text: No, I don't know anything about that.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: I've already researched everything about Water Seven!!

dialogue.speaker: Franky
dialogue.text: The govern- went already knows that.

dialogue.speaker: Chopper
dialogue.text: Now that you're a criminal, you're mine!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: He's a great guy, that Tom is....!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: So, there really is such a thing?

summary: Back in the present, Aqua Laguna bears down on Water Seven while CP9 prepares to leave with Robin and Franky.
